name: Blade, Nanook || Wubbaboo fight
description:
I have ideas tbh.. But in this Au Blade is an Aeon too!! 🤯Wow..

But here's the point,there is a Limited edition Wubbaboo that silver wolf wants... Butt you also want it too! So there's no other choice but for Blade and Nanook bicker and kill eachother.. (if that happened anyway since they are immortals.. :3)

Yes! Nanook is a male in this Au >.< I know they are a they but they'll be a male in here :3 (Simping for Nanook)
creator: Mikaiyo
